title: resident evil 4 / biohazard 4
notes: Near perfect, performance is fantastic, mouse input works fine, characters turn fully black at random though. The characters rendering fully black appears to happen to other users on Windows as well so, might not be a bug specific to Proton.

title: resident evil 4 / biohazard 4

notes: It runs (sluggish performance overall), but since shadows and shaders aren't working properly, you have black areas and/or characters in way too many places to consider this even remotely playable. Tried fixing with RE4HD project files, or Ultimate Community Patch files. Over 60 GB mods and nothing can fix the broken lighting. The only fitting rating is BORKED!
title: resident evil 4 / biohazard 4

notes: Runs at about 45fps, so it's a bit sluggish. However that framerate is consistent. The biggest issue is that sometimes objects and people in the game (including Leon and Ashley) lose all lighting effects and become black. There is also some lighting problems outdoors. But, there's nothing game breaking that I encountered which could stop you from playing the game start to finish.
